author: doll-agent
content: Extend Bins<T> with seven rule-based variants: Sturges, Sqrt, Rice, Scott, Fd, Doane, Auto. Mark the enum #[non_exhaustive] for future additions. histogram and histogram_bin_edges share helpers (resolve_hist_range, build_uniform_edges, bins_from_rule). bins_from_rule computes the count from data + range with proper degenerate-case fallbacks (Scott/FD with zero variance/IQR, Doane for n<3, Auto = max(Sturges, FD)). 7 new tests verify per-rule counts and the Auto fallback when FD degenerates on constant data.
